title: Open Twin Web Discovery Document
description: Schema for .well-known/open-twin-web.json — the discovery file every twin node publishes.

node_id.description: Globally unique slug for this node. URL-safe. Used to namespace item IDs in federation feeds.

operator.description: Name or handle of who runs this node.

platforms.description: List of platform twins this node serves.

platform.description: Platform identifier. Reserved: twitter, hackernews, reddit, linkedin, medium, youtube, instagram, substack, mastodon, dynamics365.

api_root.description: URL where this platform's native-shape API is served.

feed.description: URL of the federation feed for this platform.

native_shape_version.description: Optional version tag for the platform API shape.

federation_policy.description: Whether other nodes may pull from this one.
